{{CargoRelic
|name=Rape of the Sabines
|class_id=22532
|rank=AA
|affct=ART
|birthday=04-26
|source=
|description=On Apr 26, 1583 AD, Giambologna completed this famous sculpture.<br>Rape of the Sabines is a sculpture from the Renaissance period created by Giambologna. The statue is inspired by a Roman legend where the Romans tricked the Sabine tribe to attend a festival, only to capture their women. It depicts the images of the young men abducting the women, the helpless old man, and the women fighting back, all interlaced in a spiral-like movement, forming a perfect artistic unity that creates a unique landscape from any angle, making it one of the top works of the Renaissance period.
|fame=32
|art=67
|fth=45
|civ=49
|tech=35
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
